arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Preview: Athletic Bilbao vs. Viktoria Plzen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Athletic Bilbao and Viktoria Plzen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal BOMBSHELL: Gunners 'close' to Nico Williams agreement
arts.sum: The 22-year-old is widely expected to secure a move this summer and FootballTransfers understands that he is a key target for Mikel Arteta’s side as the Gunners look to bolster their forward line. Arsenal are “close” to reaching a full agreement with Athletic Club winger Nico Williams, according to a bombshell report in Spain.
